title: The Weave: A New Beginning
description: A Vanilla+ pack designed with vanilla client compatibility in mind. Anyone can join you, modpack or not!
body:
![text of "The Weave A New Beginning" in the style of minecraft title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dc7c5d3e1187810ab7b25d97bdbc0c79c9e11b41.png)

A performant Fabric modpack designed to overlay on top of Vanilla Minecraft, both the client and server are 100% compatible with vanilla servers and clients - everyone can join you without needing the pack! Due to this, game-altering features are implemented using data-packs. **Controller and VR support included.**

> For server installation, please see the Source link for this project.

# Features

Some highlighted features are available below:

## Server-Wide

- [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat) - proximity and channel based in-game voice chat program - no need to call on Discord. Requires additional server setup, see mod page.
- [Dungeons and Taverns](https://modrinth.com/datapack/dungeons-and-taverns) - adds various new structures to the world generation.
- [Vanilla Refresh](https://modrinth.com/datapack/vanilla-refresh) - adds a lot of tweaks and QoL changes like the ability to sit anywhere or see the stats of other players.
- [Waystones](https://modrinth.com/datapack/waystones-data-pack) - adds a craftable Waystone block allowing teleportation between other Waystones to promote communities whist allowing player homes to be miles apart! Can be configured to cost XP.
- [Rope Ladders](https://modrinth.com/datapack/gm4-rope-ladders) - place ladders downwards just from the first block! Makes caving in the modern cave biomes less tedious.

## Client-Side

- [Controlify](https://modrinth.com/mod/controlify) - adds full controller support.
- [Vivecraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/vivecraft) - adds full PCVR support.
- [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) - Shader support, with BSL Shaders pre-installed.
